description: MercadoLibre-style e-commerce product detail page with React frontend, FastAPI backend, and SQLite database

features.description: Project skeleton initialized — monorepo structure, git, init.sh runs both servers
steps: Verify all directories exist: backend/app/routers, frontend/src/components, scripts, docs/docs, data
Verify CLAUDE.md, feature_list.json, claude-progress.txt exist
Run init.sh and verify both backend and frontend servers start without errors
Verify git repo initialized with initial commit

features.description: Backend API skeleton — FastAPI with /health endpoint and CORS configured
steps: Run: cd backend && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000
Visit http://localhost:8000/health — returns {"code": 0, "data": {"status": "healthy"}}
Verify CORS headers present for http://localhost:5173

features.description: Frontend skeleton — React + Vite + TypeScript renders without errors
steps: Run: cd frontend && npm run dev
Visit http://localhost:5173 — renders without console errors
Verify TypeScript compilation succeeds

features.description: Database schema and seed data — SQLite with products, sellers, reviews, payment methods
steps: Run seed script: cd backend && python -m app.seed
Verify data/ecommerce.db created with 5+ products
Verify each product has seller, images, specs, and reviews

features.description: Product detail API — GET /api/v1/products/{id} returns full product with seller, images, specs
steps: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products/1 returns product JSON
Response includes: id, title, description, price, original_price, images[], seller{}, specs[]
Response format: {"code": 0, "data": {...}, "message": "ok"}
404 returned for non-existent product

features.description: Product listing API — GET /api/v1/products with pagination and category filter
steps: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products returns paginated list
Support query params: page, page_size, category
Response includes total count and page metadata

features.description: Seller API — GET /api/v1/sellers/{id} returns seller profile
steps: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/sellers/1 returns seller JSON
Response includes: id, name, is_official, reputation, location, logo_url

features.description: Reviews API — GET /api/v1/products/{id}/reviews returns paginated reviews
steps: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/products/1/reviews returns reviews
Each review includes: id, user, rating, title, content, date
Supports pagination with page and page_size params

features.description: Payment methods API — GET /api/v1/payment-methods returns available methods
steps: curl http://localhost:8000/api/v1/payment-methods returns list
Includes credit cards, debit cards, and digital wallets
Each method has: id, name, type, icon_url, installments_available

features.description: Static image serving — product images served from /static/images/
steps: Place test image in backend/static/images/
Access via http://localhost:8000/static/images/test.jpg
Images load correctly in frontend

features.description: Backend unit tests — all endpoints tested with pytest and httpx AsyncClient
steps: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -v
Tests cover: products, sellers, reviews, payment-methods endpoints
Tests use test database fixture, not production data
All tests pass

features.description: Image gallery component — main image + thumbnails, click to switch
steps: Render ImageGallery with product images array
Main image displays first image by default
Click thumbnail switches main image with transition
Display image counter (e.g., 1/5)

features.description: Product info component — title, description, rating stars, review count
steps: Render ProductInfo with product data
Display title, short description, full description
Show star rating with numeric value
Show review count as clickable link

features.description: Price block component — current price, original price, discount badge, installments
steps: Render PriceBlock with price data
Show current price prominently
Show original price with strikethrough when discount exists
Show discount percentage badge
Show installment info (e.g., '10 installments of $43.90')

features.description: Payment methods component — credit/debit cards, installments, digital wallets
steps: Render PaymentMethods with payment data from API
Show credit card options with installment plans
Show debit card and digital wallet options
Collapsible section with 'See all payment methods' link

features.description: Seller card component — official store badge, name, reputation indicator
steps: Render SellerCard with seller data
Show official store badge when is_official is true
Display seller name and reputation
Show location and store link

features.description: Reviews section component — star distribution bar and individual review cards
steps: Render ReviewsSection with reviews data
Show average rating and total count
Display star distribution bar chart
Show individual review cards with user, rating, title, content, date

features.description: Stock and shipping component — availability badge, free shipping, delivery estimate
steps: Render StockShipping with product stock data
Show stock availability with green 'In Stock' badge
Show 'Free Shipping' badge when applicable
Display estimated delivery date

features.description: Breadcrumb navigation — category path with clickable links
steps: Render Breadcrumb with category path
Display path: Home > Category > Subcategory > Product
Each segment is a clickable link
Last segment (product name) is not a link

features.description: Product specifications component — expandable spec table with key-value pairs
steps: Render ProductSpecs with specifications data
Display specs in a clean table layout
Support expandable section for long spec lists
Show 'See all specifications' button

features.description: Responsive layout — mobile/tablet/desktop breakpoints matching MercadoLibre style
steps: Desktop (>1024px): two-column layout with image gallery left, info right
Tablet (768-1024px): adjusted column widths
Mobile (<768px): single column, stacked layout
All components reflow properly at each breakpoint

features.description: Product detail page — wire all components, fetch from API, render complete page
steps: Navigate to /products/1 in browser
All components render with real API data
Image gallery, title, price, payment methods, seller, reviews, stock all visible
No console errors

features.description: End-to-end test — backend serves data, frontend renders all sections correctly
steps: Start both servers
Load product page for product ID 1
Verify all API calls succeed
Verify all UI sections render with correct data

features.description: Responsive design verification — all breakpoints work without layout issues
steps: Test at 375px width (mobile)
Test at 768px width (tablet)
Test at 1440px width (desktop)
No horizontal overflow or broken layouts at any size

features.description: MkDocs documentation — architecture, API reference, quickstart, examples
steps: Run mkdocs build without errors
Docs include: index, quickstart, architecture, api-reference, modules, examples
Documentation is browsable locally in browser
